MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 2600 Van Ness Avenue, LLC is present. Represented by Josh Pebet.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gina Mobley is present.
Attorney Dennis J. Sinclitico representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-03-2012 is vacated.
